title: oxera baladica
intro: Oxera baladica, also known as the Balade Oxera or Kawa Kawa, is a small shrub native to New Caledonia, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. The medicinal properties of Oxera baladica lie in its leaves, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Oxera baladica include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to soothe sore throats and relieve congestion. Oxera baladica can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for a range of applications in traditional medicine.
